languages.text: "Вы позорите Астра Милитарум. Перед лицом общего врага ругаетесь и тянете время. Вместо того, чтобы объединиться и дать бой".
"You are a disgrace to the Astra Militarum. When faced with a common enemy, you bicker and stall for time. Instead of uniting and fighting."
languages.original_text: "Вы позорите Астра Милитарум. Перед лицом общего врага ругаетесь и тянете время. Вместо того, чтобы объединиться и дать бой".

traits.locale_text: "You are a disgrace to the Astra Militarum. When faced with a common enemy, you bicker and stall for time. Instead of uniting and fighting."
"You are a disgrace to the Astra Militarum. When faced with a common enemy, you bicker and stall for time. Instead of uniting and fighting."
"You are a disgrace to the Astra Militarum. When faced with a common enemy, you bicker and stall for time. Instead of uniting and fighting."

languages.text: 「お前はアストラ・ミリタラムに恥となる存在だ。共通の敵に直面した時、お前たちは口論し、時間を稼ぐ。団結して戦うのではなく」
languages.original_text: "You are a disgrace to the Astra Militarum. When faced with a common enemy, you bicker and stall for time. Instead of uniting and fighting."

traits.locale_text: 「お前はアストラ・ミリタラムに恥となる存在だ。共通の敵に直面した時、お前たちは口論し、時間を稼ぐ。団結して戦うのではなく。」

languages.text: "Astra Militarum için utanç kaynağısınız. Ortak bir düşmanla karşılaştığınızda birleşip savaşmak yerine didişip zaman kaybediyorsunuz."
languages.original_text: "You are a disgrace to the Astra Militarum. When faced with a common enemy, you bicker and stall for time. Instead of uniting and fighting."

traits.locale_text: "Astra Militarum için utanç kaynağısınız. Ortak bir düşmanla karşılaştığınızda birleşip savaşmak yerine didişip zaman kaybediyorsunuz."

languages.text: «Son una desgracia para el Astra Militarum. Al enfrentarse a un enemigo común, discuten y tratan de ganar tiempo en lugar de unirse y luchar».
languages.original_text: "You are a disgrace to the Astra Militarum. When faced with a common enemy, you bicker and stall for time. Instead of uniting and fighting."

traits.locale_text: «Son una desgracia para el Astra Militarum. Al enfrentarse a un enemigo común, discuten y tratan de ganar tiempo en lugar de unirse y luchar».

languages.text: “你们简直是星界军的耻辱。大敌当前，不联手抗敌，反倒彼此争吵，拖延时间。”
languages.original_text: "You are a disgrace to the Astra Militarum. When faced with a common enemy, you bicker and stall for time. Instead of uniting and fighting."

traits.locale_text: “你们简直是星界军的耻辱。大敌当前，不联手抗敌，反倒彼此争吵，拖延时间。”

languages.text: « Vous faites honte à l'Astra Militarum. Au lieu d'unir vos forces pour combattre un ennemi commun, vous perdez votre temps en chamailleries. »
languages.original_text: "You are a disgrace to the Astra Militarum. When faced with a common enemy, you bicker and stall for time. Instead of uniting and fighting."

traits.locale_text: « Vous faites honte à l'Astra Militarum. Au lieu d'unir vos forces pour combattre un ennemi commun, vous perdez votre temps en chamailleries. »

languages.text: "Ihr seid eine Schande für das Astra Militarum. Im Angesicht eines gemeinsamen Feindes hadert Ihr und spielt auf Zeit, anstatt zu kämpfen!"
languages.original_text: "You are a disgrace to the Astra Militarum. When faced with a common enemy, you bicker and stall for time. Instead of uniting and fighting."

traits.locale_text: "Ihr seid eine Schande für das Astra Militarum. Im Angesicht eines gemeinsamen Feindes hadert Ihr und spielt auf Zeit, anstatt zu kämpfen!"
